what_it_does: Stores design canvas state with one section named dense, whose labels map v1-ops to "V1 · Index — Operations".
observations: The root object contains a sections object.
The only section key shown is dense.
labels contains one entry: v1-ops maps to "V1 · Index — Operations".
standouts: A single nested label mapping defines the visible operations index label.
conventions: Uses compact JSON with nested state under sections -> dense -> labels.
Uses an identifier-style key, v1-ops, for a human-readable label.
The label text combines version, index, and domain wording.
notes: This file is a minimal design-canvas state fragment defining one dense-section label.
questions: What does the dense section represent in the canvas?
What does v1-ops identify beyond its displayed label?
intention_signals: It seems intended to preserve the display label for an operations index item within a dense design-canvas section.
novelty: A very compact state file whose visible content is limited to one deeply nested label entry.
contribution: Provides structured design-canvas label metadata for an operations index entry that a fused system would keep as section-state information.
summary_for_embedding: This is a minimal JSON design-canvas state file containing one dense-section label mapping, v1-ops to "V1 · Index — Operations".
intention_for_embedding: This was for storing the display label of an operations index item in design-canvas state.
